task.summary: Starting to scaffold together a framework for rendering views.
* Basic view rendering framework with tests. * Cursor position methods in the RopeBuffer. * Named markes in RopeBuffer, following Java/Swing Document behavior. * Lots of added doc comments.

MESSAGE.value: Starting to scaffold together a framework for rendering views.
* Basic view rendering framework with tests. * Cursor position methods in the RopeBuffer. * Named markes in RopeBuffer, following Java/Swing Document behavior. * Lots of added doc comments.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: * Basic view rendering framework with tests. * Cursor position methods in the RopeBuffer. * Named markes in RopeBuffer, following Java/Swing Document behavior. * Lots of added doc comments.
